html:
Travel absorbed most of the day — a Baramati trip kept deep work off the table, but a new thread opened up with a spontaneous Startup School registration.

What got done

  • Registered for Startup School after coming across it; committed to completing it
  • Set up or updated the Startup School project index in Obsidian (1_Projects/Startup-School/_INDEX.md)
  • Published yesterday's daily log on the daily-pulse site

In progress

  • Startup School — registered, not yet started
  • Company Brain — explicitly flagged to begin tomorrow

Areas touched

  • Startup School
  • Daily Pulse (site maintenance)

Commits

daily-pulse-site

  • 12fba8a Daily log: 2026-07-09

A day split between wrapping things up and longer conversations — Exartisi hit its required deadlines, and the evening went to a dinner visit and a serious talk about direction.

What got done

  • Completed all required deadlines for Project Exartisi — can now sit on pause until back in SD
  • Began exploring distribution options for the Legal Diary Android app
  • Had a lengthy conversation with SO about focusing on startups; Startup School notes were revisited in Obsidian off the back of this

In progress

  • Legal Diary Android app distribution — just started looking, nothing shipped yet

Areas touched

  • Project Exartisi
  • Legal Diary (Android distribution)
  • Startup School / founder thinking

A day split between project work and an interruption, with reading and a language streak threaded through the edges.

What got done

  • Worked on Project Exartisi across two stretches — morning, and again late afternoon into evening
  • Read DDIA Chapter 2 (in progress — see below)
  • Kept the Duolingo French streak alive at 156 days, completing a lesson
  • Published and then reverted a premature daily log entry for 2026-07-09 on the daily-pulse site
  • Cleaned up duplicate date headings in the 2026-07-06 and 2026-07-07 log entries
  • Updated Job-change-and-search Preparation notes and index in Obsidian

In progress

  • DDIA Chapter 2 — started but not completed

Areas touched

  • Project Exartisi
  • System Design Interview prep
  • Daily pulse site maintenance
  • Job search / career prep
  • French (Duolingo)

Commits

daily-pulse-site

  • 4f78a3d Revert "Daily log: 2026-07-09"
  • 2d6a297 Daily log: 2026-07-09
  • a9a89de Strip duplicate date heading from 2026-07-06 and 2026-07-07 entries

Social obligations ate most of the day, leaving only a narrow window for focused work. Output was limited, but the reading got done.

What got done

  • Finished Chapter 1 of Designing Data-Intensive Applications — system design prep underway
  • Published daily log entry to the daily-pulse site

In progress

  • Designing Data-Intensive Applications — Chapter 1 complete, rest of book ahead

Areas touched

  • System design study
  • Daily-pulse site

A setup day — new infrastructure laid down and a couple of loose ends caught up on, with budget work partially through.

What got done

  • Stood up the daily note infrastructure and wrote a startup notes doc
  • Initialized the daily-pulse-site repo and published logs for both July 6 and July 7 (with a correction replacing a misfiled 2026-07-07 entry)
  • Built the daily-pulse publisher tool, including support for an optional date argument to handle backdated entries
  • Caught up Bank of America transactions in the budget

In progress

  • American Express budget reconciliation started but not finished

Areas touched

  • Daily note / logging infrastructure
  • daily-pulse + daily-pulse-site tooling
  • Personal budget (Bank of America, American Express)
